description_long: This object is a medium-sized bird with a streamlined, elongated body and a slightly pointed head. Its plumage is predominantly mottled brown and cream, with darker speckling along the back and lighter tones on the underside. The beak is short and straight, blending smoothly into the head, and the tail is relatively short and appears rounded at the tip. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the legs are not prominently visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath. The overall texture of the feathers is dense and slightly rough, with a matte finish that reduces shine. The bird's coloration and patterning provide effective camouflage in natural or urban park environments.
description: A medium-sized, mottled brown and cream bird with a streamlined body, short straight beak, and rounded tail. Its dense, speckled plumage and matte finish give it a camouflaged appearance.
description_view_0: The bird is seen from above, showing its elongated, mottled back and the full length of its body and tail.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the bird's compact profile, short beak, and the subtle curve of its back.
description_view_2: The underside is visible, displaying lighter, speckled plumage and the rounded shape of the body and tail.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bird's profile and the blending of its plumage pattern.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled with dark spots and streaks on a brown and cream background
